programme.desc: Hoteliers Richard and Denise have knocked down the family home in the Adelaide Hills and are rebuilding an even bigger version, despite the fact their kids are grown. This modern mansion will have all the bells and whistles, amid resort-like luxury on three tiered acres overlooking Adelaide, but is this unpretentious, likeable couple creating a home or a hotel for themselves? Money may be no object, but have they taken on too much?

programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.desc: Experts from leading auction houses tour towns across the UK, valuing treasured items brought in by members of the public.

programme.desc: It's week three in the pottery and the ten remaining potters attempt a children's toy Noah's ark toy and animals. Hosted by Siobhan McSweeney with judges Keith Brymer Jones and Rich Miller.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Newlyweds Nathan and Emily are at a crossroads over what to do with their home of less than 2 years. Emily loves it and believes a re-working of the current space will unlock its potential. Nathan looks at the high maintenance yard and wants out. Who will win this couple over? Mr Winter or will Mr Whittaker have a few tricks up sleeve?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: In a bid to move closer to family, Nicki Chapman helps a buyer find a home in the Oxfordshire countryside for her and her son. Nicki pops in on friends who recently moved to the county.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross looks after proceedings from Dorking in Surrey. Danny Sebastian and David Harper look after our bargain hunters, who have to spend 300 pounds on three items within an hour.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Australia's number one lifestyle program brings viewers fresh and inspiring ways to makeover their home, the latest in design and craft, plus a great variety of delicious recipes.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Ardent collectors Kerry and Judy have a passion for Sante-fe style, mud houses even though they live on a sloping bush block on Sydney's north shore. Inspired by an unconventional builder who changes his mind (and their design) on a regular basis, they set out to create a home out of recycled timber and corrugated iron, rendered in clay dug up from the side of the road. It may be straight out of the American mid west but this hybrid home will have a distinctly Australian flavour and provide an earthy backdrop for their many artistic objects, artifacts and collectables.

programme.title: Location Location Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil help Richie and his girlfriend Katy, who have recently returned home after 10 months of globetrotting. Meanwhile, Ann-Marie and partner Lee are looking for a period home in some of Yorkshire's most sought after spots.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Grand Designs UK

programme.title: George Clarke's Beautiful Builds

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: A solitary writer adopts her late friend's Great Dane and, through their bond, starts to come to terms with her past and reconnect with her creative self.

programme.title: Dangerous Animals
programme.desc: When Zephyr, a free-spirited surfer, is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: September 5
programme.desc: Unveils the decisive moment that forever changed media coverage and continues to impact live news today. Set during the 1972 Munich Summer Olympics, an American Sports broadcasting team must quickly adapt from sports reporting to live coverage of the Israeli athletes taken hostage.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy tycoon Zsa-zsa Korda names his nun daughter sole heir. As he starts a new venture, they face threats from scheming rivals, terrorists, and assassins.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: After more than thirty years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. When he finds himself training a detachment of Top Gun graduates for a specialised mission the likes of which no living pilot has ever seen, Maverick encounters Lt. Bradley Bradshaw, call sign: "Rooster", the son of Maverick's late friend and Radar Intercept Officer Lt. Nick Bradshaw, aka "Goose". Facing an uncertain future and confronting the ghosts of his past, Maverick is drawn into a confrontation with his own deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who will be chosen to fly it.

programme.title: Utopia
programme.desc: A soldier searches for his missing wife, infiltrating a facility he believes is tied to trafficking, only to find it's a futuristic park blurring reality and illusion.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Heart Eyes
programme.desc: A masked maniac with glowing red eyes returns each Valentine's Day to kill couples. An ad exec and her romantic colleague become targets and vow to stop the terror.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British family's idyllic country estate.

programme.title: Germanwings: What Happened On Flight 952
programme.desc: In 2015, Germanwings Flight 9525 crashes in the French Alps, killing 150 passengers and crew members. A decade later, survivors, experts and journalists have their say.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: The Last Journey
programme.desc: Sweden. Renowned Swedish TV duo Filip and Fredrik embark on a trip to France, aiming to rekindle the zest for life of Filip's father. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Funny Birds
programme.desc: Thrown together under tragic circumstances, three generations of women from the same family are forced to learn to live together on a small rural chicken farm in New Jersey.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Firebrand
programme.desc: Katherine Parr, Henry VIII's sixth wife, becomes regent while he battles abroad. When he returns sick and paranoid, she must fight for her survival.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: In 1947, a visionary architect and his wife flee post-war Europe to rebuild their legacy in the United States, but their lives are transformed by a mysterious, wealthy client.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Loretta Sage's novels are filled with ancient tombs and daring adventures, but that doesn't mean she's prepared for them in real life. When she is kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire to locate a legendary lost city, Loretta's handsome cover model, Alan, sets off on a heroic but hapless rescue mission. Thrust into an epic thrill-ride through the jungle, the unlikely pair must work together to survive the elements, and survive each other, to find the city's fabled treasure before it's lost forever.

programme.title: Sacramento
programme.desc: Free-spirited Rickey, clinging to his Peter Pan ways, convinces his settled friend Glenn to pause domestic life for an unplanned road trip across California.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to transform his appearance. However, his dream face quickly becomes a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: Emmanuelle
programme.desc: Emmanuelle travels alone to Hong Kong on a business mission. In the vibrant and sensual global city, she indulges in intense encounters and new experiences.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows three remarkable women in Mexico, each pursuing their own happiness. Cartel leader Emilia enlists unappreciated lawyer Rita to help fake her death so that she can finally live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Shoshana
programme.desc: Two British police officers Thomas Wilkin and Geoffrey Morton in their hunt for charismatic poet and Zionist freedom fighter Avraham Stern, who was plotting to evict British authorities.

programme.title: Rumours
programme.desc: Leaders of the wealthiest democracies face absurd challenges as night falls in misty woods, realising they are suddenly alone and struggling with their incompetence.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: About to embark on a world tour, global pop sensation Skye Riley begins experiencing increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and the pressures of fame, Skye is forced to face her past.

programme.title: The Idaho Student Murders
programme.desc: Explores the real - life horror that occurred in the idyllic town of Moscow, Idaho, where criminology student Bryan Kohberger faced four first-degree murder charges and the death penalty for the murder of four University students.

programme.title: High Ground
programme.desc: When a mysterious prisoner lands in his jail, a border town sheriff faces the wrath of a brutal cartel.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: A classmate introduces teenage Owen to a mysterious late-night TV show - a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. Owen's view of reality begins to crack.

programme.title: Dangerous Animals
programme.desc: When Zephyr, a free-spirited surfer, is abducted by a shark-obsessed serial killer and held captive on his boat, she must figure out how to escape before he carries out a ritualistic feeding to the sharks below.

programme.title: Mr Burton
programme.desc: The true story of the wild school boy Rich Jenkins, son of a boozy miner, and the English teacher who recognised his talent, Philip Burton.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers: D'artagnan
programme.desc: France. D'Artagnan arrives in Paris trying to find his attackers after being left for dead, which leads him to a real war where the future of France is at stake. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Jeanne Du Barry
programme.desc: The life of Jeanne Becu, who was born as the illegitimate daughter of a seamstress in 1743 and went on to rise through the Court of Louis XV to become his last official mistress.

programme.title: Kerouac's Road: The Beat of a Nation
programme.desc: A modern exploration of On the Road, as celebrities and travellers reflect on real experiences in a digital world, mirroring Kerouac's search for genuine connection.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails face Shadow, a powerful new foe. Outmatched, they form an unexpected alliance to stop him and protect the planet.

programme.title: Tuesday
programme.desc: A mother and her teenage daughter must confront Death when it arrives in the form of an astonishing talking bird.

programme.title: Am I Ok?
programme.desc: Lucy and Jane have been best friends for most of their lives and think they know everything there is to know about each other. But when Jane announces she's moving to London, Lucy reveals a long-held secret. As Jane tries to help Lucy, their friendship is thrown into chaos.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: To stay in the country, a gay man offers to fund his friend's IVF if she marries him. Chaos ensues when his grandmother plans a lavish Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: Two Tickets to Greece
programme.desc: France. When childhood friends Magalie and Blandine cross paths after many years, they decide to finally take their dream vacation to Greece. (Subtitles)

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story, an enchanting adventure about a lost penguin rescued from an oil spill, who transforms the life of a heartbroken fisherman. They soon become unlikely friends, so bonded that even the vast ocean cannot divide them.

programme.title: Sidelined 2: Intercepted
programme.desc: As college tests their relationship, freshman quarterback Drayton and promising dancer Dallas navigate love and distance while searching for who they're meant to be. As the pressures of ambition, recovery, and growing independence mount, the couple struggles to hold on.

programme.title: How To Lose A Popularity Contest
programme.desc: A rebellious student and a perfectionist overachiever form an unlikely alliance in the race for student body president, discovering unexpected feelings as competition heats up.

programme.title: Novocaine No Pain
programme.desc: When the girl of his dreams gets kidnapped, a man turns his inability to feel pain into an unexpected advantage as he fights a bunch of thugs to get her back.

programme.title: The Last Gunfight
programme.desc: Top assassins battle in a brutal underground tournament, but a rogue crew aims to survive, outsmart the killers, and bring down the mastermind behind it all.

programme.title: Am I Ok?
programme.desc: Lucy and Jane have been best friends for most of their lives and think they know everything there is to know about each other. But when Jane announces she's moving to London, Lucy reveals a long-held secret. As Jane tries to help Lucy, their friendship is thrown into chaos.

programme.title: Midas Man
programme.desc: On Thursday 9 November 1961, a man named Brian descended the stairs to a cellar in Liverpool and changed the world forever.

programme.title: Cassino in Ischia
programme.desc: Nic Cassino goes to Italy to work with struggling Italian directors on the first-ever "Neo-Realist" action movie in an effort to revitalize his career.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: A classmate introduces teenage Owen to a mysterious late-night TV show - a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own. Owen's view of reality begins to crack.

programme.title: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Marvin, a Milwaukee real estate agent, gets a crimson envelope from a former partner-in-crime. Thrust into a world of hitmen and betrayal, he must face his dark past and a vengeful crime lord brother.

programme.title: Love & Rage: Munroe Bergdorf
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Munroe Bergdorf - author, model, and leading transgender activist.

programme.title: Emmanuelle
programme.desc: Emmanuelle travels alone to Hong Kong on a business mission. In the vibrant and sensual global city, she indulges in intense encounters and new experiences.

programme.title: The Phoenician Scheme
programme.desc: Wealthy tycoon Zsa-zsa Korda names his nun daughter sole heir. As he starts a new venture, they face threats from scheming rivals, terrorists, and assassins.

programme.title: Maria
programme.desc: Famed opera singer Maria Callas retreats to Paris in the 1970s after a glamorous yet tumultuous life in the public eye.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: A heartbroken pop star spontaneously weds a stranger from the audience while live on stage, but their sham marriage turns into a real romance.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Over one day across the streets of LA, three lives will change forever. Desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiralling into the most insane escape.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic becomes entangled in a web of deceit and murder.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th president of the United States.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: September 5
programme.desc: Unveils the decisive moment that forever changed media coverage and continues to impact live news today. Set during the 1972 Munich Summer Olympics, an American Sports broadcasting team must quickly adapt from sports reporting to live coverage of the Israeli athletes taken hostage.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows three remarkable women in Mexico, each pursuing their own happiness. Cartel leader Emilia enlists unappreciated lawyer Rita to help fake her death so that she can finally live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Spin the Bottle
programme.desc: A group of friends plays spin the bottle in a house marked by a massacre, unleashing an evil spirit. As they die in terrifying ways, the survivors must uncover the house's dark secrets.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: There are a million reasons not to like realtor Oren Little, and that's just the way he likes it. Wilfully obnoxious to anyone who might cross his path, he wants nothing more than to sell one last house and retire in peace and quiet, until his estranged son suddenly drops off a granddaughter he never knew existed and turns his life upside-down. Clueless about how to care for a sweet, abandoned nine-year-old, he pawns her off to his determined and lovable neighbour Leah and tries to resume his life uninterrupted. But little by little, Oren stubbornly learns to open his heart to his family, to Leah and to life itself.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Join Diane Keaton, Bette Midler and Goldie Hawn in this sinfully satisfying revenge romp about a trio of first wives who team up to teach their lying, cheating ex-husbands a lesson. Ivana Trump's galvanising cameo - 'don't get mad, dahlinks, get everytink' - sets the scene in a comedy that hinges on the self-mockery of its ageless stars. Midler's ball-busting shtick, Keaton's ditsy vulnerability and Hawn's eternal youth are just light-hearted grist for the mill of female friendship as a serious source of strength.

programme.title: Fun Mom Dinner
programme.desc: Four mums, whose only common ground is their kids' preschool class, get together for a dinner. The night begins as a disaster, but they have more in common than they thought.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Reuben Feffer is a guy who's spent his entire life playing it safe. Polly Prince is irresistible as a free-spirit who lives for the thrill of the moment. When these two comically mismatched souls collide, Reuben's world is turned upside down, as he makes an uproarious attempt to change his life from middle-of-the-road to totally-out-there.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up on the outskirts of Orlando. There's only one glitch: she's financing her shopping sprees with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US. With only one week to hunt down the con artist before his world implodes, the real Sandy Patterson is forced to extreme measures to clear his name.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl sees her life paralleling Hester Prynne's in 'The Scarlet Letter', which she is currently studying in school - until she decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: Jay and Annie are a married couple still very much in love, but ten years and two kids have cooled the passion. To get it back, they decide - why not? - to make a video of themselves trying out every position in The Joy Of Sex in one marathon three-hour session. It seems like a great idea, until they discover that their most private video has gone public. In a panic, they begin a wild night of adventure - tracking down leads, roping in friends, duping Annie's boss - all to reclaim their video, their reputation, their sanity, and, most importantly, their marriage.

programme.title: Here Today
programme.desc: Veteran comedy writer Charlie Burnz forms an unlikely yet hilarious and touching friendship with New York lounge singer Emma Payge. Emma unexpectedly wins a lunch with the comedy legend, and their friendship gets off to an extremely rocky start (think seafood allergy, a hospital visit, and an epi pen). Before long, each finds in the other a sort of soul mate, forging a deep bond that kicks the generation gap aside and redefines the meaning of friendship, love, and trust.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect
programme.desc: Beca is that girl who'd rather listen to what's coming out of her headphones than what's coming out of you. Arriving at her new college, she finds herself not right for any clique but somehow is muscled into one that she never would have picked on her own: alongside mean girls, sweet girls and weird girls whose only thing in common is how good they sound when they sing together, in the out-loud comedy Pitch Perfect. When Beca takes this acoustic singing group out of their world of traditional arrangements and perfect harmonies into all-new mash-ups, they fight to climb their way to the top of the cutthroat world of college a cappella. This could wind up either the coolest thing they'll ever do or the most insane, and it will probably be a little of both.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an all-American girls' professional baseball league formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: Suddenly 30
programme.desc: A hilarious flash-forward romance about a pre-teen girl who goes from geek to glamorous. With the help of some magic wishing dust, 13-year-old Jenna Rink becomes 30 and gorgeous overnight, with everything she ever wanted, except for her best friend Matt. Now, this grown woman must create some magic of her own to help the little girl inside find the true love she left behind.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime. In a screwball set-up involving a writer who goes undercover to demonstrate how women routinely put men off by crashing their poker-nights and letting our poodles pee on their pool tables, her sitting duck is a hotshot adman on a bet to demonstrate what men can do to make women fall for them in a matter of 10 days or so.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Allison Scott is an up-and-coming entertainment journalist whose 24-year-old life is on the fast track. But it gets seriously derailed when a drunken one-night stand with slacker Ben Stone results in an unexpected pregnancy. Faced with the prospect of going it alone or getting to know the baby's father, Allison decides to give the lovable layabout a chance. An overgrown kid with no desire to settle down, Ben learns he has a big decision to make with his kid's mother-to-be: will he run or stay?

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: An old-school anchorman who quit his longtime evening newscast because of its new, gossipy ways is recruited by a hotshot producer who is looking to revive a failing morning show.

programme.title: Book Club
programme.desc: Four lifelong friends have their lives forever changed after reading 50 Shades of Grey in their monthly book club.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: So you think you don't have a clue? Join the club, as high-schoolers Cher and Dionne's plan to transform a lonely misfit into a total babe backfires in the worst possible way. From the director of Fast Times at Ridgemont High comes a 'teenagers save the world' comedy based loosely on Jane Austin's Emma, that elevated Alicia Silverstone from that Aerosmith girl to a star in the making.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifetime best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour. Though lovelorn and broke, Annie bluffs her way through the expensive and bizarre rituals. With one chance to get it perfect, she'll show Lillian and her bridesmaids just how far you'll go for someone you love.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Henry lives an enviable life in a Hawaiian paradise, spending every night with a beautiful tourist in search of an island fling. It's a sweet life with no strings attached, until he meets Lucy. He and Lucy hit it off from the get-go, but the next day she acts like she doesn't know him. Has his karma come around to kick him in the butt, or what? Actually, Lucy has short-term memory loss, so every night all memory of her day is erased, but a man in love will go to any lengths to win over the girl of his dreams, and if that means having to find imaginative ways of doing it over again every day, then Henry's up for the challenge.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young and vibrant New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have just found the perfect place to settle down and share a bright future. But their new home comes with a permanent fixture they didn't expect: an obnoxious elderly tenant who won't move out and refuses to die! Pushed to the edge of insanity as their dream home turns into a nightmare, it's only a matter of time before Alex and Nancy begin to entertain some truly sinister solutions to their problem.

programme.title: And Mrs
programme.desc: When a reluctant bride-to-be's fiance drops dead, she insists on marrying him anyway, vowing to overcome public opinion, the law of the land, and her loved one's objections.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: Take a lesson from Cameron Diaz when she stars as Elizabeth Halsey, a foulmouthed, ruthless and inappropriate teacher. She drinks, gets high and can't wait to marry a meal ticket to get out of her bogus day job.When she's dumped by her fiance, she sets her sights on a rich, handsome substitute (Justin Timberlake) while shrugging off the advances of the school gym teacher (Jason Segel). The consequences of her wild and outrageous schemes give her students, co-workers', and even herself, an education like no other.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 2
programme.desc: Beca, Fat Amy and the Barden Bellas are back to pitch slap the world! After a scandal threatens to derail their last year at Barden, the three-time defending champs worry that they've lost their harmony for good. With one chance left at redeeming their legacy, they must they must face off against the toughest competition on the planet: German supergroup Das Sound Machine and fight for their right to win at the World Championships of A Cappella. It will take the power of sisterhood to find their voice and see what it takes to be the world's top pitches!

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five best friends from college reunite 10 years later for a wild bachelorette weekend in Miami. Their partying takes a dark turn when they accidentally kill a male stripper.

programme.title: Duplex
programme.desc: Young and vibrant New Yorkers Alex and Nancy have just found the perfect place to settle down and share a bright future. But their new home comes with a permanent fixture they didn't expect: an obnoxious elderly tenant who won't move out and refuses to die! Pushed to the edge of insanity as their dream home turns into a nightmare, it's only a matter of time before Alex and Nancy begin to entertain some truly sinister solutions to their problem.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of today's most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer. As the victims begin to pile up and the laughs pile on, none of your favourite scary movies escape the razor-sharp satire of this outrageously funny parody.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl sees her life paralleling Hester Prynne's in 'The Scarlet Letter', which she is currently studying in school - until she decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up on the outskirts of Orlando. There's only one glitch: she's financing her shopping sprees with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US. With only one week to hunt down the con artist before his world implodes, the real Sandy Patterson is forced to extreme measures to clear his name.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: Jay and Annie are a married couple still very much in love, but ten years and two kids have cooled the passion. To get it back, they decide - why not? - to make a video of themselves trying out every position in The Joy Of Sex in one marathon three-hour session. It seems like a great idea, until they discover that their most private video has gone public. In a panic, they begin a wild night of adventure - tracking down leads, roping in friends, duping Annie's boss - all to reclaim their video, their reputation, their sanity, and, most importantly, their marriage.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Julianne is almost 28 and still single, but that's OK because on her 28th birthday, Michael is going to propose, thanks to a safety net pact they made in their youth. But when the phone call finally comes, her best friend has found someone else. With Michael unavailable, Julianne realises that she loves him and must stop his wedding!

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of today's most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer. As the victims begin to pile up and the laughs pile on, none of your favourite scary movies escape the razor-sharp satire of this outrageously funny parody.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: Did You Hear About the Morgans?
programme.desc: A delightful comedy about finding love in the most unexpected places. Two successful New Yorkers, Paul and Meryl, are at their wits' end with repairing their strained marriage. But when they become the only witnesses to a brutal murder, the police hide them away in Wyoming, together. Now these die-hard city dwellers will have to survive the weather, bears, fresh air, and forced time with one another if they want to make it out alive.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the World Championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren't job prospects for making music with your mouth. But when they get the chance to reunite for an overseas USO tour, this group of awesome nerds will come together to make some music, and some questionable decisions, one last time.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: An old-school anchorman who quit his longtime evening newscast because of its new, gossipy ways is recruited by a hotshot producer who is looking to revive a failing morning show.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Growing up the best of friends, they share the strong bond of free-spirited youth and good-natured rivalry. But the truth will ultimately set them at odds, as one becomes the ruler of the most powerful empire on earth, the other the chosen leader of his people. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty McFly, a typical American teenager of the 1980s, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered DeLorean time machine, invented by a slightly mad scientist. During his often hysterical but amazing trip back in time, Marty must make certain his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so that he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

programme.title: Elizabeth
programme.desc: This is the critically acclaimed epic of the queen's turbulent and treacherous rise to power. Before the Golden Age, Elizabeth was a passionate and naive girl who came to reign over a land divided by bloody turmoil. Amid palace intrigue and attempted assassinations, the queen is forced to become a cunning strategist while weighing the counsel of her mysterious advisors, thwarting her devious rivals and denying her own desires for the good of her country.

programme.title: Elizabeth: The Golden Age
programme.desc: In late 16th century Europe, Elizabeth finds her rule openly challenged by the Spanish King Philip II with his powerful army and sea-dominating armada determined to restore England to Catholicism.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Set in the Los Angeles of the slight future, this film follows Theodore Twombly, a complex, soulful man who makes his living writing touching, personal letters for other people. Heartbroken after the end of a long relationship, he becomes intrigued with a new, advanced operating system, which promises to be an intuitive entity in its own right, individual to each user. Upon initiating it, he is delighted to meet "Samantha", a bright, female voice, who is insightful, sensitive and surprisingly funny. As her needs and desires grow, in tandem with his own, their friendship deepens into an eventual love for each other. An original love story that explores the evolving nature - and the risks - of intimacy in the modern world.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows three remarkable women in Mexico, each pursuing their own happiness. Cartel leader Emilia enlists unappreciated lawyer Rita to help fake her death so that she can finally live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility
programme.desc: Based on Jane Austen's classic novel, this tells of the Dashwood sisters, sensible Elinor and passionate Marianne, whose chances at marriage seem doomed by their family's sudden loss of fortune. Rickman, Grant and Greg Wise co-star as the well-intentioned suitors who are trapped by the strict rules of society and the conflicting laws of desire.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The incredible true story of the enigmatic and opportunistic businessman Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust. This emotional film chronicles the trials and triumphs of one man who made a difference, and the tribulations of those who survived one of the darkest chapters in human history because of his actions.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich, a struggling single mum who exposes a powerful utility company for dumping deadly toxic waste which is slowly poisoning the local residents. Employed as a filing clerk in her lawyer's firm, the former beauty queen stumbles across this landmark case that transforms her into a working class hero.

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A new, technologically superior Soviet nuclear sub, the Red October, is heading for the US coast under the command of Captain Marko Ramius. The American government thinks Ramius is planning to attack. A lone CIA analyst has a different idea: he thinks Ramius is planning to defect, but he has only a few hours to find him and prove it - because the entire Russian naval and air commands are trying to find him, too. The hunt is on.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: A harrowing war drama where two Black Hawk helicopters are shot down over Mogadishu, trapping an elite team of American soldiers in a 15-hour firefight as they try to recover their fallen comrades.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Having lost his memory and the one person he loved, Bourne is forced to hunt down his past in order to find a future. Travelling from Moscow, Paris and London to Tangier and New York City, he continues his quest to find the real Jason Bourne, all the while trying to out-manoeuvre the scores of cops, federal officers and Interpol agents who have him in their sights.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: A murdered man returns to save the woman he loves from a similar fate.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: This film follows a man with a low IQ who has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events - in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. Yet, despite all the things he has attained, his one true love eludes him.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan
programme.desc: Seen through the eyes of a squad of American soldiers, the story begins with Wold War II's historic D-Day invasion, and then moves beyond the beach as the men embark on a dangerous special mission. Captain John Miller must take his men behind enemy lines to find Private James Ryan, whose three brothers have been killed in combat. Faced with impossible odds, the men question their orders. Why are eight men risking their lives to save just one? Surrounded by the brutal realities of war, each man searched for his own answer - and the strength to triumph over an uncertain future with honour, decency and courage.

programme.title: Elizabeth
programme.desc: This is the critically acclaimed epic of the queen's turbulent and treacherous rise to power. Before the Golden Age, Elizabeth was a passionate and naive girl who came to reign over a land divided by bloody turmoil. Amid palace intrigue and attempted assassinations, the queen is forced to become a cunning strategist while weighing the counsel of her mysterious advisors, thwarting her devious rivals and denying her own desires for the good of her country.

programme.title: Flashdance
programme.desc: Alex bravely fights her way out of the welding gear, off the stripper pole, and onto the dance school floor.

programme.title: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: He's mean and green and he hates the yo-ho-hoing. The Grinch conspires to steal Christmas from Whoville, making off with the presents, decorations, trees and every other joyful thing.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Dr Sherman Klump, a kind, calorically challenged genetics professor who longs to shed his 400-pound frame in order to win the heart of the beautiful Carla Purty. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes Buddy Love, a fast-talking, pumped up, plumped-down Don Juan. Can Sherman stop his buff alter ego before it's too late, or will Buddy have the last laugh?

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda, realizes the man she lives with has been unfaithful. Two women who have never met and live 6000 miles apart, find themselves in the exact same place. They meet online at a home exchange website and impulsively switch homes for the holiday. Iris moves into Amanda's L.A. house in sunny California as Amanda arrives in the snow covered English countryside. Shortly after arriving at their destinations, both women find the last thing either wants or expects: a new romance. Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: It Could Happen to You
programme.desc: In this heart-warming comedy, Charlie Lang buys a lottery ticket, leaving him short of cash to tip Yvonne, the waitress in his favourite lunch spot. Charlie offers her half the winnings and when the ticket pays $4 million, he incurs the wrath of his wife, Muriel, by honouring his promise. Muriel screams and goes manic when the winning number is read on the TV, and she screams twice as loud when Charlie finally tells her what he has done. As Charlie and Muriel grow apart, Charlie and Yvonne grow together.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: Flashdance
programme.desc: Alex bravely fights her way out of the welding gear, off the stripper pole, and onto the dance school floor.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: The Holiday
programme.desc: Iris is in love with a man who is about to marry another woman. Across the globe, Amanda, realizes the man she lives with has been unfaithful. Two women who have never met and live 6000 miles apart, find themselves in the exact same place. They meet online at a home exchange website and impulsively switch homes for the holiday. Amanda is charmed by Iris' handsome brother Graham and Iris, with inspiration provided by legendary screenwriter Arthur, mends her heart when she meets film composer Miles.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The continuing story of the Crawley family.

programme.title: How Do You Know
programme.desc: Lisa is a professional softball player who finds herself adrift when she is suddenly dumped from the team. Confused and looking for direction, Lisa begins a fling with self-centred womaniser Matty, a major league baseball pitcher eager to have his ego stroked.

programme.title: Flashdance
programme.desc: Alex bravely fights her way out of the welding gear, off the stripper pole, and onto the dance school floor.

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel crosses the path of a beautiful ballerina his gift for dance is revealed. Soon he is torn between his past life and a journey for a dream.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Roadhouse Romance
programme.desc: Country music fan Callie is determined to continue her late grandfather's legacy. While TV director Luke is in town, he teaches her that sometimes it's best to look forward instead of back.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. Now, just days before her marriage, Faith receives a call from her fiance's old friend, Damon Bradley, who phones with best wishes on his way to Venice, Italy. Determined to get at least a glimpse of the man before her wedding she grabs Kate, her best friend and takes the next plane to Italy. There, she bumps instead into Peter, who instantly knows Faith is his soul mate, now all he has to do is convince her.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: Sidelined: The QB and Me
programme.desc: A headstrong dancer and a cocky quarterback fight against their feelings for each other as their post-grad future threatens to keep them apart.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Not that Bridget's counting, but it's been six weeks, four days, and seven hours with flawless boyfriend, Mark Darcy. When Daniel Cleaver returns, can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever?

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: In the worldwide phenomenon, Ana is an inexperienced college student tasked with interviewing enigmatic billionaire Christian Grey. But what starts as business quickly becomes an unconventional romance. Swept up in Christian's glamorous lifestyle, Ana soon finds another side to him as she discovers his secrets and explores her own dark desires. What results is a thrilling, all-consuming romance as Christian and Ana test the limits they will go to for their relationship.

programme.title: Roadhouse Romance
programme.desc: Country music fan Callie is determined to continue her late grandfather's legacy. While TV director Luke is in town, he teaches her that sometimes it's best to look forward instead of back.

programme.title: Only You
programme.desc: An incurable romantic throws caution to the wind and goes to Italy in search of an elusive soul mate. Faith has waited all her life to meet Damon Bradley, the name given as her eventual soul mate both by her ouija board, at age 11, and a carnival fortune teller. programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams, but has to enlist his loyal assistant, Katherine, to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie.

programme.title: Perfect Romance
programme.desc: In the process of matchmaking for her daughter, a mother meets an unlikely romantic interest.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Not that Bridget's counting, but it's been six weeks, four days, and seven hours with flawless boyfriend, Mark Darcy. When Daniel Cleaver returns, can Bridget find a way to make true love last forever?

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: In the worldwide phenomenon, Ana is an inexperienced college student tasked with interviewing enigmatic billionaire Christian Grey. But what starts as business quickly becomes an unconventional romance. Swept up in Christian's glamorous lifestyle, Ana soon finds another side to him as she discovers his secrets and explores her own dark desires. What results is a thrilling, all-consuming romance as Christian and Ana test the limits they will go to for their relationship.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime. In a screwball set-up involving a writer who goes undercover to demonstrate how women routinely put men off by crashing their poker-nights and letting our poodles pee on their pool tables, her sitting duck is a hotshot adman on a bet to demonstrate what men can do to make women fall for them in a matter of 10 days or so.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: With help from a handsome banker, Maddie tries to save her business. When her first love returns home, she must choose between a new romance and the man she never stopped loving.

programme.title: Emma.
programme.desc: Jane Austen's beloved comedy about finding your equal and earning your happy ending is reimagined in this delicious film adaptation.

programme.title: Fools Rush In
programme.desc: Alex Whitman, a New York based site manager who builds nightclubs, is assigned to Las Vegas for his latest project. One night he meets Isabel Fuentes, a Mexican born photographer, and they end up sleeping together. The next morning she slips out and then shows up three months later to inform him that she's pregnant. She doesn't want to marry, but instead wants him to act like her boyfriend, so that her parents and other family members will get to meet the man she'll later say is the father of her baby. Things get complicated, however, when a romance blossoms between them and they quickly get married in a Vegas chapel. This doesn't go over well with her Mexican and his Manhattan parents. That, and their inability to decide where to live, begins to put a strain on their marriage. From that point on, they try to work things out as they have an on again, off again relationship.

programme.title: Mickey Blue Eyes
programme.desc: He walks the wawk. He talks the tawk. Noo Yawk is about to encounter a most unlikely mobster. At the centre of this lively fish-out-of-water comedy romp is a dapper Manhattan art auctioneer named Michael Felgate. Eager to marry Gina, the lovely teacher he's been dating for three months, Michael feels it's time he meet her family. What he meets is the family. Gina's father Frank is a gangster a "juicer" who extracts money for the mob. Now the squeeze is on Michael to use the auction house as a money-laundering scam for dubious artwork plunging fumbling, bumbling Michael into a world where he must pose as a notorious wise guy called Mickey Blue Eyes. You'll call him hilarious.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: When a wounded Christian Grey tried to entice a cautious Ana Steele back into his life, she demands a new arrangement before she will give him another chance. As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime. In a screwball set-up involving a writer who goes undercover to demonstrate how women routinely put men off by crashing their poker-nights and letting our poodles pee on their pool tables, her sitting duck is a hotshot adman on a bet to demonstrate what men can do to make women fall for them in a matter of 10 days or so.

programme.title: Emma.
programme.desc: Jane Austen's beloved comedy about finding your equal and earning your happy ending is reimagined in this delicious film adaptation.

programme.title: Kiss My Act
programme.desc: An aspiring stand-up comedian with low self-esteem gives her best material to a pretty colleague who attracts a talent scout.

programme.title: Fools Rush In

As the two begin to build trust and find stability, shadowy figures from Christian's past start to circle the couple, determined to destroy their hopes for a future together.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Mack is tired of doing all the things she has to do to keep up with her friends and become successful in her 30s. Her deepest wish is to be an older woman so she can just chill out and wear a good chunky sweater. But when she's struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod at Coachella and becomes Rita, a 65-year-old woman, Mack learns that the reality of being an older age isn't quite what she imagined.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: Far and Away
programme.desc: Ron Howard's epic tale tells the story of two Irish immigrants' quest for land during the 1800s Oklahoma land rush. Joseph Donnelly is an ambitious young farmer in western Ireland. When a local protest against wealthy landlord Daniel Christie results in the death of his father, Joseph seeks revenge. But his attempt vengeance is thwarted by Shannon Christie, the landlord's high-spirited and headstrong daughter, who stabs Joseph with a pitchfork. While convalescing at the Christie's manor, Joseph is propositioned by Shannon, who asks him to travel with her to America - where she is determined to acquire some of the free land being given away in the Oklahoma Territory. Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Anastasia and Christian have settled into a life together, but lingering demons from Christian's past threaten to disrupt their happily ever after.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: The Crawley family goes on a grand journey to the South of France to uncover the mystery of the dowager countess's newly inherited villa.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: The son of the richest man in town wants to marry the town's beauty queen, but then she meets an interesting stranger who just got off the train.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It
programme.desc: Lindsey travels to Ireland to acquire land for a resort. She decides to enter the town's matchmaking festival to prove her investment in the community and win over a handsome local.

programme.title: She's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon stars as a young man terrified of marriage and the adult responsibility that goes along with it. Elizabeth McGovern stars as his wife Kristy. Together Jake and Kristy face nearly every terror of young adulthood, from interfering in-laws and career crises to overextended credit and maintaining a house, but are they up to the perils of impending parenthood?

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Jo March reflects back and forth on her life, telling the beloved story of the March sisters - four young women, each determined to live life on her own terms.

Arriving in Boston, Joseph acts as a protective brother to Shannon in the foreign city streets as they struggle to earn the money to travel out west.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Anastasia and Christian have settled into a life together, but lingering demons from Christian's past threaten to disrupt their happily ever after.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: Killer Engagement
programme.desc: When a woman is murdered, and her fiance becomes the prime suspect. Successful matchmaker Angie works to prove her client's innocence, much to the dismay of Kyle, the detective working the case.

programme.title: Good Luck To You, Leo Grande
programme.desc: Retired teacher, Nancy, embarks on a post-marital sexual awakening with sex worker, Leo who draws on all his skills and charm, and together they find a surprising human connection.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: Pleasantville
programme.desc: Two modern American teenagers are sucked into their television set and end up living in a black-and-white '50s sitcom.

programme.title: It Could Happen to You
programme.desc: In this heart-warming comedy, Charlie Lang buys a lottery ticket, leaving him short of cash to tip Yvonne, the waitress in his favourite lunch spot. Charlie offers her half the winnings and when the ticket pays $4 million, he incurs the wrath of his wife, Muriel, by honouring his promise. Muriel screams and goes manic when the winning number is read on the TV, and she screams twice as loud when Charlie finally tells her what he has done. As Charlie and Muriel grow apart, Charlie and Yvonne grow together.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: Cecilia tries to rebuild her life after the death of her abusive partner. But before long, she questions whether or not he is truly gone.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Hannibal 'The Cannibal' Lecter comes out of hiding to draw FBI agent Clarice Starling into a new high-stakes battle that will test her strength, cunning, and loyalty.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: The highly anticipated 9th film from Quentin Tarantino. In 1969 Los Angeles, during the Charles Manson murders, a TV actor and his stunt double, embark on an odyssey to make a name for themselves in the film industry.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Night Passage
programme.desc: A former Los Angeles lawman becomes the new police chief of a small fishing town that holds dirty secrets.

programme.title: Mary Queen of Scots
programme.desc: A historical drama about the life of the Scottish monarch, Mary Stuart, and her contentious rivalry with her cousin, Elizabeth I. Upon the death of her husband, the King of France, 18-year-old Mary returns to her native Scotland to reclaim her rightful place on the English throne, thereby threatening the reign of Elizabeth I. Both powerful women in a world dominated by men, Mary and Elizabeth vie against each other for love, authority and influence as they each seek to fortify their respective thrones.

programme.title: Pride And Prejudice (2005)
programme.desc: Mr Bennet is an English gentleman living in Hertfordshire with his overbearing wife and five daughters; the beautiful Jane, the clever Elizabeth, the bookish Mary, the immature Kitty and the wild Lydia. Unfortunately for the Bennet's, if Mr Bennet dies their house will be inherited by a distant cousin whom they have never met, so the family's future happiness and security is dependent on the daughters making good marriages. Life is uneventful until the arrival in the neighbourhood of the rich gentleman Mr Bingley, who rents a large house so he can spend the summer in the country. Mr Bingley brings with him his two sisters and the dashing but proud Mr Darcy. Love is soon in the air for one of the Bennet sisters, while another may have jumped to a hasty prejudgment. For the Bennet sisters many trials and tribulations stand between them and their happiness, including class, gossip and scandal.

programme.title: The Invisible Man
programme.desc: Cecilia tries to rebuild her life after the death of her abusive partner. But before long, she questions whether or not he is truly gone.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Otto is a grump who's given up on life following the loss of his wife, and wants to end it all. When a young family moves in nearby, he meets his match in quick-witted Marisol.

programme.title: As Good as it Gets
programme.desc: An antisocial writer, a single mother, and a gay artist become unlikely friends in this comedy-drama.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A Harvard professor implicated in a murder must unravel an ancient code to expose the greatest conspiracy in history.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Langdon discovers evidence of the resurgence of an ancient secret brotherhood known as the Illuminati, he also faces a deadly threat to the existence of the secret organisation's most despised enemy: the Catholic Church. When he learns that the clock is ticking on an unstoppable Illuminati time bomb, he jets to Rome where he joins forces with beautiful Italian scientist Vittoria Vetra and together they follow a 400-year-old trail of ancient symbols that mark the Vatican's only hope for survival.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: The famous symbologist Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia and finds himself the target of a manhunt. Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks; a doctor he hopes will help him recover his memories. Together, they race across Europe and against the clock to stop a virus that would wipe out half of the world's population.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: Otto is a grump who's given up on life following the loss of his wife, and wants to end it all. When a young family moves in nearby, he meets his match in quick-witted Marisol.

Langdon teams up with Sienna Brooks; a doctor he hopes will help him recover his memories. Together, they race across Europe and against the clock to stop a virus that would wipe out half of the world's population.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. During a transatlantic flight from New York City to London, US Air Marshal Bill Marks receives a series of cryptic text messages demanding that he instruct the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account. Until he secures the money, a passenger on his flight will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: This is the remarkable story of the Agojie, the all-female unit of warriors who protected the African Kingdom of Dahomey in the 1800s with skills and a fierceness unlike anything the world has ever seen. Inspired by true events, "The Woman King" follows the emotionally epic journey of General Nanisca as she trains the next generation of recruits and readies them for battle against an enemy determined to destroy their way of life. Some things are worth fighting for.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea with two bullets in his back, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his violent past. Racing to unlock the secret of his own identity, he discovers the deadly truth: he's an elite government agent. To the government, Jason Bourne isn't just their property: he's a malfunctioning $30 million weapon. Lethally trained, built to disappear, he's an agent on the run who has to be taken out. Now, the government's top operative has become its No.1 target.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: John Dillinger, a charismatic and elusive bank robber, is marked by the FBI as America's first 'Public Enemy No.1' and Billie Frechette is the only woman capable of capturing his heart. Hunted relentlessly by top FBI agent Melvin Purvis, Dillinger engages in an escalating game of outrunning and outgunning the FBI, culminating in an explosive, legendary showdown.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Mickey O'Neil, a bare knuckles gypsy fighter, is roped in to save the necks of two small-time operators whose scheming collides with that of a lunatic kingpin villain, Brick Top, and a missing diamond smuggler.

programme.title: Non-Stop
programme.desc: A suspense thriller played out at 40,000 feet in the air. During a transatlantic flight from New York City to London, US Air Marshal Bill Marks receives a series of cryptic text messages demanding that he instruct the airline to transfer $150 million into an off-shore account. Until he secures the money, a passenger on his flight will be killed every 20 minutes.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Prescription For Murder
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor aids a detective in investigating a rapidly growing string of murders at Atlanta Memorial Hospital.

programme.title: Blackhat
programme.desc: After a nuclear plant is hacked by unknown culprits, an FBI agent joins forces with a convicted hacker and the Chinese in an effort to bring down the criminals.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Mickey O'Neil, a bare knuckles gypsy fighter, is roped in to save the necks of two small-time operators whose scheming collides with that of a lunatic kingpin villain, Brick Top, and a missing diamond smuggler.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. The local police aren't used to much action until the son of unassuming town snowplough driver, Nels Coxman, is murdered at the order of Viking, a flamboyant drug lord. Fuelled by rage and armed with heavy machinery, Nels sets out to dismantle the cartel one man at a time, but his understanding of murder comes mainly from what he read in a crime novel. As the bodies pile up, his actions ignite a turf war between Viking and his long-standing rival White Bull, a soulful Native-American mafia boss, that will quickly escalate and turn the small town's bright white slopes blood-red.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Erin Brockovich, a struggling single mum who exposes a powerful utility company for dumping deadly toxic waste which is slowly poisoning the local residents. Employed as a filing clerk in her lawyer's firm, the former beauty queen stumbles across this landmark case that transforms her into a working class hero.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Former CIA assassin Jason Bourne resurfaces just as his former employers are implementing a new program aimed at hunting him down. Now fully recovered from his amnesia, Bourne teams up with Nicky Parsons to uncover the truth behind his father's death, while simultaneously exacting revenge and evading the government forces hot on his trail.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Brad Pitt stars as Billy Beane, a former would-be superstar of baseball, who is now the general manager of Oakland A's team. Just before the 2002 season, Billy faces a huge problem, three of their star players have been bought by other clubs who have access to huge budgets. With a weak team with a history of losses coupled with little budget, Billy hires Yale-educated economist Peter Brand (Jonah Hill) who set about to find discards of the game who have key skills but are undervalued because they are injured or too old. The coach Art Howe (Philip Seymour Hoffman) refuses to co-operate however and Billy has to become more involved with the players and the system to see whether they have a chance of success.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young gun takes a job in a law firm with connections to the Mafia and is soon caught up in blackmail.

programme.title: The Interpreter
programme.desc: In one of the hidden corridors of power at United Nations headquarters, translator Silvia Broome overhears a potentially explosive secret about a planned assassination attempt.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Welcome to Kehoe, it's -10 degrees and counting at this glitzy ski resort in the Rocky Mountains. programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: A young Indian boy gets lost on the streets of Calcutta, miles from home. He is eventually adopted by an Australian couple, but years later he sets out to find his lost family.

programme.title: Soccer Mom Madam
programme.desc: A single mother establishes a high-end escort service that matches beautiful young women with the wealthiest and most powerful men in the city.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and Manhattan Assistant District Attorney are determined to bring to justice one of the world's most powerful banks. Uncovering myriad and reprehensible illegal activities, Salinger and Whitman follow the money from Berlin to Milan to New York to Istanbul. Finding themselves in a high-stakes chase across the globe, their relentless tenacity puts their own lives at risk as their targets will stop at nothing, not even murder, to continue financing terror and war.

programme.title: The Kingdom
programme.desc: FBI agents sent to Saudi Arabia to nab a mass murderer team up with their Arab counterparts in a do-or-die mission for unlikely allies.

programme.title: Father Stu
programme.desc: After surviving a motorcycle accident, a former boxer and long-time agnostic starts to wonder if he can use his second chance to help others, and his journey from self-destruction to redemption inspired countless people along the way.

programme.title: Lucy
programme.desc: An action-thriller about a woman accidentally caught in a dark deal that turns the tables on her captors. Altered by a dangerous new drug allowing her to use 100% of her brain capacity, Lucy transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Will Graham is an expert investigator who quit the Bureau after almost losing his life in the process of capturing the elusive Dr Hannibal Lecter. Years later, after a series of particularly grisly murders, Graham reluctantly agrees to come out of retirement and assist in a mysterious case. But he soon realises that the best way to catch this killer, known as the Tooth Fairy, is to find a way to get inside the killer's mind.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden. Cady becomes a terrifying presence as he menacingly circles Bowden's increasingly unstable family. Realising he is legally powerless to protect his beautiful wife Leigh and his troubled teenage daughter Danielle, Sam resorts to unorthodox measures which lead to an unforgettable showdown on Cape Fear.

programme.title: State of Play
programme.desc: When D.C. Reporter Cal McCaffrey is assigned to investigate the murder of an assistant to an up-and-coming politician, he uncovers a conspiracy that threatens to bring down the nation's power structures. In a town of spin-doctors and wealthy power brokers, he will discover one truth: when fortunes are at stake, no one's integrity, love or life is safe.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: A FedEx systems engineer's ruled-by-the-clock existence abruptly ends when a harrowing plane crash leaves him isolated on a remote island. As Chuck struggles to survive, he finds that his own personal journey has only just begun.

programme.title: The PGA Players Official Film
programme.desc: Celebrating its 40th anniversary at TPC Sawgrass, THE PLAYERS Championship delivers another unforgettable tournament. After a weather-impacted first round concludes 54 hours after it begins, the island green, 17th hole takes center stage, challenging the game's best players, and the drama unfolds all the way up until the 72nd hole of the championship as one of the PGA TOUR'S bright, young superstars claims one of the game's most coveted titles.

After a weather-impacted first round concludes 54 hours after it begins, the island green, 17th hole takes center stage, challenging the game's best players, and the drama unfolds all the way up until the 72nd hole of the championship as one of the PGA TOUR'S bright, young superstars claims one of the game's most coveted titles.

programme.title: Live From The Players
programme.desc: The countdown continues to the opening round of The Players Championship, as the panel break down the big stories ahead of the weekend.

programme.title: The Players Preview Show
programme.desc: THE PLAYERS Championship stands alone as the PGA TOUR's flagship event. Whether you're a past champion, a first timer, or a fan of the game, THE PLAYERS Championship is an event that you do not want to miss.

programme.title: Live From The Players
programme.desc: The countdown continues to the opening round of The Players Championship, as the panel break down the big stories ahead of the weekend.

programme.title: Live From The Players
programme.desc: A comprehensive analysis and reaction from the opening round of the Players Championship.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick prepares for battle over a pair of vintage posters, but will he win the war? Then, Rick and Chum call on the power of Grayskull as they check out a large Battle Cat toy. Will the duo be cringing from sticker shock, or will they be able to transform the negotiations? Meanwhile, Corey takes a look at an old fireman's megaphone. Can he ignite a deal, or will he get hosed? And later, Chum heads over to a photo gallery to see a shot of a lifetime. Will this be a picture-perfect deal, or is he just chasing waterfalls?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When Rick sets his sights on a musket rifle from the 1800s, can he take a shot at this deal, or is he off the mark? Meanwhile, a seller tries to flex with a signed autobiography by Arnold Schwarzenegger. Will Rick bring home the gold, or will his offer be terminated? Then, an old ventriloquist's dummy makes Corey and Rick's heads spin. Will Corey be able to throw his voice into the negotiation, or will Rick be the one pulling all the strings? And later, is Chum swinging for the fences when he tries to bring home a signed poster from the movie, the Sandlot?

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame and dog Bella are in a race across the red deserts of Australia's centre hauling classic cars to auction, but delays in loading and the arrival of the wet season threaten the journey home.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Veteran long haul driver Mick King is about to take an 18m-long road train into the Great Sandy Desert to rescue two abandoned vintage army trucks for a good cause.

programme.title: Cabin Truckers
programme.desc: There's a dream home - and there's a dream location. Cabin Truckers follows the incredible exploits of hauling colossal cabins to remote, picturesque locations. Watch as an expert team navigates through extremely rocky, mountainous terrain, delivering precious cargo to thrilled homeowners. Melissa Torgeson and Peter Reid's home was destroyed in a fire. They've designed and bought a ready to move home that Kelly and the movers will have to be careful not to damage - especially with the clients riding along.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve Grahame and dog Bella are in a race across the red deserts of Australia's centre hauling classic cars to auction, but delays in loading and the arrival of the wet season threaten the journey home.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Veteran long haul driver Mick King is about to take an 18m-long road train into the Great Sandy Desert to rescue two abandoned vintage army trucks for a good cause.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: For two months out of every year, a group of exceptional men find their way to the Canadian tundra to undertake one of the most dangerous jobs on earth. In the thick of winter, truckers in giant eighteen wheelers carry vital equipment and supplies to miners hundreds of miles away. In blizzard conditions, these truckers travel over ice roads that often take them over frozen lakes. Each man is trained in self survival, from fixing his truck in sub zero conditions in seconds to escaping from a truck if the ice cracks. On the other end of the journey are miners whose lives depend on the truckers making it to their base, year after year. The episodes will form a narrative arch - taking the viewer on a journey from when the experienced and novice truckers first sign up for the season, to the last truck making it back to base.

programme.title: Ice Vikings
programme.desc: All crews race toward the end of season on March 31, desperate to make quota before they're forced off the ice. Emotions run high as the Kristjanson crew surveys the damage and recovers of what's left of Trevors narrow gauge bomber. Justin and Mike remove their entire Hecla operation despite being short of their seasonal quota but become buried in slush right on top of the crack. With just days to go, the Pishkes contemplate setting more nets to overcome a late season drop off. After his most challenging season ever, Trevor carefully considers his future on the ice.

programme.desc: Former Daily Show host and correspondent John Oliver brings his persona to this weekly news satire program.

programme.desc: The team seek out the wreck of the Revonoc, a racing yacht that vanished in 1958 with a crew of five. A freak magnetic anomaly was detected in the Triangle when she went missing.
